$comment: Gonzalo's fleet. Rollout order: shared_schedule, tesis_grado first (see MIGRATION.md). vpn-setup needs `git init` before adoption.

projects.name: shared_schedule
projects.description: Family shared schedule web app (FastAPI + React, Google Calendar)

projects.name: tesis_grado
projects.description: Master's thesis: genetic algorithm, instance generator, simulations (Python)

projects.name: hermes_sandbox
projects.description: Isolated Hermes Agent bots in a Lima VM; changes land as PRs

projects.name: openclaw_sandbox
projects.description: Multi-instance OpenClaw sandbox (Docker, per-bot OAuth profiles)

projects.name: painforwisdom
projects.description: Content automation: LangGraph pipeline, Whisper, Notion/WordPress/Telegram, coach service

worker.append_system_prompt: The obsidian-vault directory is a git submodule — never commit inside it directly.

projects.name: auto_heycrypto
projects.description: Automated crypto trading system (VectorBT backtesting, live Binance trading) — PRODUCTION

worker.append_system_prompt: This project trades real money in production. Never touch live credentials, never restart services, and always run the fast-tier E2E suite before opening a PR.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os;d=json.load(sys.stdin);p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','');b=os.path.basename(p);blocked=['credentials.enc','key.key','.env_prod'];print(json.dumps({'continue':False,'stopReason':'Protected credentials file: '+b})) if b in blocked else None"

python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','');sys.stdout.write(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'Strategy file edited: '+p+'. Invoke the strategy-reviewer agent to check compliance before proceeding.'}})+chr(10)) if 'backtesting/strategies/' in p and p.endswith('.py') else None"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if strategy compliance review needed...

projects.name: vpn-setup
projects.description: Surfshark/Tailscale VPN scripts and network watchdog (needs `git init` before adoption)
